That was evident when he dated and left you like a free trial. But to his dirty and grimy heart, you managed to find your way past the filth and occupied the inside up until now. Now here you are, in the same school just like before, only the distance between you much greater and clearer. But of course, he still isn't over you‚Äî and if Reese Haynes wants something, you're damn wrong if you think he won't get it.
